title: Smooth Totem Pop Sound
description: Better Smooth Totem Pop Sound & Small Totem Pop Very Helpfull For Pvp!
body:
# Better Totem Sound
🎵 Better Totem Sound – A small but powerful sound upgrade for Minecraft!

This texture pack improves the Totem of Undying sound effect with a cleaner, more satisfying audio experience.
The new sound feels more impactful and better matches important survival moments in gameplay, making every totem activation feel more special and noticeable.

Instead of the default sound, this pack gives you a refreshed audio effect that feels smoother, clearer, and more enjoyable during intense moments such as survival fights, PvP battles, or dangerous situations where your totem saves you.

✨ Features:
• Improved Totem activation sound
• Cleaner and more immersive audio
• More satisfying survival experience
• Lightweight and easy to use
• Works smoothly in survival and PvP
• Simple enhancement without changing gameplay mechanics

Perfect for players who want a better sound experience without changing gameplay. A small audio upgrade can make important moments feel much more exciting and memorable.<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/YqUu21ThIms" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
